head: 87c402a3166b7cddbd9241b5f3bbdf715e6b4101
runtime: HeadlessChrome/150.0.0.0 on Linux x86_64 via Playwright CLI

customAudit.path: Open Audit your evidence, keep the seeded JSON, select Issue receipt

presentationAsset.purpose: Devpost-safe 16:9 presentation of the underlying 390px proof; does not replace the raw full-page evidence.

incident.finding: The prior committed mobile artifact rendered a stale pre-responsive capture as a narrow strip and did not prove the 390px claim.
incident.repair: Reject the stale artifact, recapture the current custom-audit flow at a true 390px viewport, and bind the viewport and favicon contracts in the HTTP regression test.
